highlights.headline: Houston Rockets vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Houston Rockets vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Houston Rockets vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 31 points, Jabari Smith Jr. added a season-high 25 and the Houston Rockets thumped the struggling Toronto Raptors 139-121 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kevin Durant scores 31 as Rockets thump struggling Raptors 139-121 for 2nd straight win

highlights.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 30 points, including 13 during a 20-3 run to end the first half that helped the Boston Celtics pull away from Cleveland to win 125-105 on Wednesday night and snap the Cavaliers’ three-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaylen Brown scores 30 as Celtics snap Cavaliers' win streak

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham had 30 points and 10 assists as the Detroit Pistons overcame a slow start to beat the Orlando Magic 135-116 on Wednesday night.

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at Denver Nuggets

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 21 points, 12 rebounds and 10 assists, matching an NBA record with his fourth straight triple-double to start the season, and the Denver Nuggets routed the winless New Orleans Pelicans 122-88 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nikola Jokic has 4th straight triple-double to start season as Nuggets rout Pelicans 122-88

headlines.description: — Jrue Holiday had 27 points and eight assists, and he hit four free throws in the final seconds to help the Portland Trail Blazers hold off a late Utah rally and beat the Jazz 136-134 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jrue Holiday scores 27 points, hits late free throws to help Blazers hold off Jazz 136-134

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Minnesota Timberwolves

highlights.description: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Minnesota Timberwolves: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Minnesota Timberwolves: Game Highlights) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Austin Reaves swished the 12-foot winner in the lane right before the buzzer to finish with 28 points and lift the Los Angeles Lakers to a 116-115 victory on Wednesday after the Minnesota Timberwolves had taken the lead with a late 14-2 run.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lakers fend off Timberwolves on Austin Reaves' buzzer-beater for 116-115 win

headlines.description: — Ja Morant scored 28 points — including a go-ahead 11-foot jumper with 7.6 seconds remaining — to push the Memphis Grizzlies past the Phoenix Suns 114-113 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ja Morant's jumper with 7.6 seconds left lifts Grizzlies over the Suns 114-113
